data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseCutPromptText: This tree looks like it can be CUT down.\pWould you like to CUT it?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseCutText: This tree looks like it can be CUT down.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseRockSmashPromptText: This rock appears to be breakable.\nWould you like to use ROCK SMASH?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseRockSmashText: It's a rugged rock, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to smash it.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseStrengthPromptText: It's a big boulder, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to push it aside.\pWould you like to use STRENGTH?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UsedStrengthText: {STR_VAR_1} used STRENGTH.\p{STR_VAR_1}'s STRENGTH made it possible\nto move boulders around.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseStrengthText: It's a big boulder, but a POKéMON\nmay be able to push it aside.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.AlreadyUsedStrengthText: STRENGTH made it possible to move\nboulders around.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseWaterfallText: A wall of water is crashing down with\na mighty roar.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseWaterfallPromptText: It's a large waterfall.\nWould you like to use WATERFALL?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.CannotUseDiveText: The sea is deep here. A POKéMON may be\nable to go underwater here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UseDivePromptText: The sea is deep here.\nWould you like to use DIVE?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UnderwaterCannotUseDiveText: Light is filtering down from above.\nA POKéMON may be able to surface here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.UnderwaterUseDivePromptText: Light is filtering down from above.\nWould you like to use DIVE?
data/field_move_scripts.inc.SurfacingBlockedText: There is something in the way above.\nDIVE can't be used here.
data/field_move_scripts.inc.SweetScentNothingHereText: There appears to be nothing here...
